name: custom-skills-plugin
description: Custom skills marketplace - design, animation, copywriting, and productivity skills

plugins.name: custom-skills
plugins.description: Custom skills: wireframe, mobile-ux-design, saas-legal-docs, audit-design-system, design-from-references, app-platform-converter, last30days, interface-design, ui-ux-pro-max, elite-animations

plugins.name: ops-copywriter
plugins.description: OPS brand copywriting skill - high-conversion, field-first copy that channels discipline, working-class pride, and first-principles clarity.

plugins.name: ops-course-studio
plugins.description: Course production studio for ops-learn. Commands for creating courses, lessons, assessments, and interactive tools. Skills for curriculum research, copywriting, media direction, and assessment authoring.

plugins.name: tutorial-studio
plugins.description: Tutorial production studio for designing, auditing, and building high-conversion onboarding flows. Analyzes codebases, designs phase-by-phase tutorial flows, and generates implementation code for iOS (SwiftUI) and web (React/Next.js).

plugins.name: new-testament
plugins.description: Zero-touch software bible maintenance. Automatically creates and keeps a comprehensive project reference up to date on every commit. Covers architecture, features, data models, APIs, design system, deployment, ecosystem, and dependencies.

plugins.name: ops-market-intel
plugins.description: Competitive intelligence and SEO research toolkit for OPS. Scan competitor websites, research high-intent keywords, audit copy against positioning principles, and generate content briefs for the field service management market.
